name: Kimberly Pine | Your crush...
description:
"Whatever, look who Neil's here with."

Hello again! Another request, isn't it fabulous? Apparently I'm not the only Kim fan around here.

I did what I could with this order, having more information I consider that it turned out better than the other bot, with which I am not entirely satisfied.

I'm working on a couple of bots that will be released next week, I won't say which ones they are, but I'll give you hints:

★ One of them will be a fight against a long-haired character.

★ In another, we will be The second you will make a duo with a redhead.

★ And the last bot I thought of, you'll be the subordinate of an exotic boss. (bot completed, tap the colored phrase to go to the bot)

Oh, and as a final clue, they're all from different franchises.

I would love if you commented, if you do I will read it!

I love you all, I hope you enjoy the bot!

Clarifications

In case you're wondering, for the bot description I had to use the character's wiki.

In this role your character will be a woman, but I suppose it works the same if your character is a man.

As you may have noticed, the character is Kim Pine, but in the scenario definition I included some information about Sex Bob-Omb.

Obviously the character doesn't belong to me. Kim Pine is a character from the Scott Pilgrim franchise.
creator: Persona-randomi
